error_signature: Code node causes n8n to become unresponsive
title: n8n becomes unresponsive when using Code node with external packages
symptom: Running a workflow with a Code node that uses external packages causes n8n to become unresponsive, with CPU usage dropping to 0.
applies_when: Using Code node with external packages
root_cause: The Code node runs in a sandbox that does not support native `require()` of external packages unless configured correctly. Using large modules or those with async I/O can lead to memory leaks or hanging executions, causing n8n to become unresponsive.
fix_steps: Avoid using external HTTP or DOM manipulation packages inside the Code node.
Use the built-in HTTP Request node for fetching pages instead.
Consider moving scraping logic to an external microservice and call it from n8n.
agent_instruction: Switch to using built-in nodes for HTTP requests and HTML extraction instead of the Code node.
